title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DeHaat International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DeHaat International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DeHaat International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About DeHaat International Enterprises:
DeHaat International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat International Enterprises!
